chapter_title.ar: باب غُسْلِ الْأَطْفَالِ وَ الصِّبْيَانِ وَ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 73 – Washing the children and boys, and the Salaat upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/131)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/131)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ
الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى الصَّبِيِّ مَتَى يُصَلَّى عَلَيْهِ

text: إِذَا عَقَلَ الصَّلَاةَ قُلْتُ مَتَى تَجِبُ الصَّلَاةُ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَ إِذَا كَانَ ابْنَ سِتِّ سِنِينَ وَ الصِّيَامُ إِذَا أَطَاقَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Halby and Zurara,

from Abu Abdullahasws having been asked about the Salaat upon the boys, when should Salaat be prayed upon him?’ Heasws said: ‘When he has reasoning, the Salaat (would be prayed)’. I said, ‘When would the Salaat be Obligated upon him?’ So heasws said: ‘When he was a son of six years of age; and the Fasting is when he can endure it’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Halabiy and Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about Salah (prayer) of a child. He (the Imam) said, ‘There is Salah (prayer) for him when he is able to understand it (Salah (prayer)).’ I (the narrator) then asked, ‘When it becomes obligatory for him? He (the Imam) said, ‘It is when he is six years old and there is fasting on him when he is able to fast.’”
